title: Homestead Crab Cakes
ingredients: Dash of Old Bay fish seasoning
Butter and olive oil for sautéing
instructions: Combine all sauce ingredients (mayonnaise through Old Bay seasoning) well in a separate bowl.
Place drained crabmeat in a large bowl.
Add bread crumbs to the crabmeat and mix well.
Add beaten egg yolks and mix thoroughly.
Stir the sauce into the crabmeat mixture.
Form the mixture into rounded patties.
Sauté the crab cakes in a butter and olive oil mixture until golden.
Mix all Spicy Remoulade Sauce ingredients together.
Place crab cakes on top of spring greens mix with sliced avocado.
Drizzle Spicy Remoulade Sauce on top of the crab cakes.
Serve with additional remoulade sauce and lemon wedges.
notes: Chef recommended Phillips Crabmeat found in the refrigerator section at Costco and some supermarkets
Recipe from the Homestead Resort in Virginia; author took a cooking class from the chef at a medical conference
Spicy Remoulade Sauce can be stored in refrigerator and also serves well with other fish
